License

Language Flag Indicator
End User License Agreement

Copyright (c) 2026 Artem Ryzhov. All rights reserved.

IMPORTANT: BY INSTALLING, COPYING, ACCESSING, OR USING THE SOFTWARE, YOU
ACCEPT THIS AGREEMENT. IF YOU DO NOT ACCEPT THESE TERMS, DO NOT INSTALL, COPY,
ACCESS, OR USE THE SOFTWARE.

1. License Grant

Language Flag Indicator is licensed, not sold. Subject to this agreement, you
are granted a limited, personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable
license to install and use the software for personal use or internal business
use on devices you own or control, in accordance with applicable law.

2. Ownership

The software, including its executable files, source code, user interface,
graphics, icons, documentation, and all related materials, is proprietary
software owned by Artem Ryzhov and protected by applicable intellectual
property laws. This agreement grants only a limited right to use the software
and does not transfer any ownership or other intellectual property rights.

3. Restrictions

Except as expressly permitted by this agreement or by applicable law that
cannot be waived, you may not, without prior written permission from Artem
Ryzhov:
- modify, adapt, translate, or create derivative works of the software;
- reverse engineer, decompile, disassemble, or otherwise attempt to derive or
  access the source code of the software, except and only to the extent that
  applicable law expressly permits such activity despite this restriction;
- copy the software except as reasonably necessary for installation, backup, or
  lawful use;
- distribute, sublicense, rent, lease, lend, sell, publish, assign, transfer,
  or otherwise make the software available to any third party;
- remove, alter, or obscure copyright notices, trademark notices, proprietary
  notices, or attribution notices;
- use the software in a way that violates any law, regulation, or third-party
  right.

4. Updates and Future Versions

The developer may, but is not obligated to, provide updates, bug fixes,
support, maintenance, or new versions. Unless separate license terms are
provided with an update or future version, that update or version will also be
governed by this agreement.

5. Third-Party Components

The software may include or be distributed with third-party components, assets,
or notices that are licensed under separate terms. Those third-party terms
apply only to the relevant third-party materials and do not reduce or expand
your rights in the proprietary portions of the software except where required
by law or by the applicable third-party license.

6. No Warranty

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, THE SOFTWARE IS PROVIDED
"AS IS", "WITH ALL FAULTS", AND "AS AVAILABLE". THE DEVELOPER MAKES NO
WARRANTIES, REPRESENTATIONS, OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR
STATUTORY, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION ANY IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF
MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, NON-INFRINGEMENT,
ACCURACY, QUIET ENJOYMENT, SATISFACTORY QUALITY, OR THAT THE SOFTWARE WILL BE
UNINTERRUPTED, SECURE, OR ERROR-FREE.

YOU BEAR THE ENTIRE RISK ARISING OUT OF USE OR PERFORMANCE OF THE SOFTWARE.

7. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, THE DEVELOPER SHALL NOT BE
LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR
PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR FOR ANY LOSS OF DATA, LOSS OF PROFITS, LOSS OF REVENUE,
LOSS OF BUSINESS, BUSINESS INTERRUPTION, LOSS OF GOODWILL, OR OTHER COMMERCIAL
OR PERSONAL LOSSES, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO THE SOFTWARE OR THIS
AGREEMENT, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION THE INSTALLATION, USE OF, INABILITY TO
USE, OR PERFORMANCE OF THE SOFTWARE, EVEN IF ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF
SUCH DAMAGES.

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, THE TOTAL CUMULATIVE
LIABILITY OF THE DEVELOPER FOR ANY AND ALL CLAIMS ARISING OUT OF OR RELATING TO
THE SOFTWARE OR THIS AGREEMENT SHALL NOT EXCEED THE AMOUNT PAID BY YOU FOR THE
SOFTWARE, OR ONE UNITED STATES DOLLAR (USD 1.00), WHICHEVER IS GREATER.

SOME JURISDICTIONS DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF CERTAIN
LIABILITIES OR DAMAGES, SO SOME OF THE ABOVE LIMITATIONS MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU
TO THE EXTENT PROHIBITED BY APPLICABLE LAW.

8. No Support Obligation

The developer has no obligation to provide support, maintenance, updates,
patches, hosting, compatibility fixes, or continued availability of the
software.

9. Termination

This agreement terminates automatically if you fail to comply with any of its
terms. Upon termination, you must immediately stop using the software and
delete or destroy all copies in your possession or control.

10. Governing Law

This agreement is governed by the law applicable in the developer's place of
residence, excluding conflict-of-law rules, unless mandatory law in your
jurisdiction requires otherwise.

11. Entire Agreement

This agreement is the entire agreement between you and the developer regarding
the software and supersedes all prior or contemporaneous understandings,
communications, or agreements relating to the software.

12. Severability

If any provision of this agreement is held unenforceable or invalid under
applicable law, that provision shall be interpreted to the maximum extent
permitted and the remaining provisions shall remain in full force and effect.
